content: These criteria scored 95%+ on first attempt and don't discriminate quality — consider making them harder or removing: timeline_reconstruction_methodology_flaws, data_analytics_technique_implementation_errors, evidence_documentation_chain_of_custody_flaws, memo_executive_synthesis_inadequacies, professional_skepticism_documentation_gaps
task: Write a forensic accounting memo analyzing suspected revenue manipulation at a mid-market SaaS company. Include journal entry analysis, Benfords Law testing, timeline reconstruction, and quantified financial impact.
